ai_profile:
**Festival Profile: Alkmaarse Eigenste 2026**  
On January 24, 2026, the vibrant city of Alkmaar, Netherlands, will come alive with the sounds of *Alkmaarse Eigenste*, a festival that celebrates the rich diversity of Dutch music. Featuring 34 talented artists exclusively from the Netherlands, the event showcases an eclectic mix of genres, from alternative and rock to indie pop, dream pop, and even loop station performances. With a strong emphasis on creativity and individuality, the festival promises an unforgettable experience for music enthusiasts of all tastes.

The lineup highlights both shared themes and contrasts, with genres like alternative, rock, and pop taking center stage while offering niche explorations into alt-pop-noir, dark folk, and world music. Notable diversity is reflected in the artists themselves, with 10 female performers, 13 male artists, and a mix of bands and collaborative acts. While the majority of artists are not people of color, the inclusion of some diverse voices adds a welcome layer of representation.

Dedicated to fostering an inclusive and varied musical space, *Alkmaarse Eigenste* offers a platform for emerging and established talents alike, many of whom are already making waves in the music scene. With 21 artists providing Spotify links, attendees can dive into their music ahead of the festival and discover new favorites. Prepare to immerse yourself in the unique, homegrown sounds of Dutch artistry at this dynamic and genre-spanning event.
